title: Product Warranty Terms — PROD-001
content: PROD-001 Standard Limited Warranty. This product is warranted against defects in materials and workmanship for a period of 24 months from the date of original purchase. To register your warranty, contact our service center at warranty@acme.example.com or call 02-1234-5678. Registered owner: 김철수 (kim.chulsoo@example.com, 010-1234-5678). Registration ID: WR-2024-0042. Warranty does not cover accidental damage, misuse, or normal wear and tear.

title: Extended Warranty Policy
content: Customers may purchase an Extended Service Plan (ESP) for PROD-001 within 90 days of purchase. ESP extends coverage to 48 months total. Eligible customers: Gold and Platinum membership holders. Contact your account manager 이영희 (lee.younghee@example.com) for pricing. Monthly plan: ₩15,000. Annual plan: ₩150,000. Claim process: submit form at acme.example.com/warranty with proof of purchase.

title: Return and Refund Policy
content: Acme Corp Return Policy (effective 2024-01-01). Items may be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. After 30 days, store credit only. To initiate a return, email returns@acme.example.com with your order number and reason. Our returns team (manager: 최지은, choi.jieun@example.com) processes requests within 3 business days. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.

title: Customer Complaint Handling Procedure
content: Complaint Reference: CMP-2024-0317. Customer: 정우성 (jung.woosung@example.com, 010-3333-2222). Issue: Received damaged PROD-001 unit. Resolution: Replacement shipped on 2024-04-10 via CJ Logistics, tracking 1234567890. Handled by: Customer Success Team. Escalation contact: cs-manager@acme.example.com. CSAT score at close: 4.2/5.0. SLA met: YES (resolved within 48 hours).

title: Manufacturing Quality Report — Q4 2024
content: Facility: Suwon Plant (Plant Manager: 이순신, lee.sunshin@corp.example.com). Reporting Period: Q4 2024 (Oct–Dec). Total Units Produced: 142,800. Defect Rate: 0.42% (target ≤ 0.50%) — TARGET MET. Defect Categories: Surface scratch 38%, Component misalignment 29%, Firmware error 21%, Other 12%. Top defect line: Line 7 (0.61% — ABOVE TARGET, corrective action initiated). Yield rate: 99.58%. Monthly trend: Oct 0.45%, Nov 0.41%, Dec 0.40% (improving).

title: Defect Root Cause Analysis — Line 7
content: Line 7 Defect Investigation Report. Analyst: 홍길동 (hong.gildong@corp.example.com). Root cause identified: Solder paste stencil worn beyond tolerance (replaced 2024-12-18). Contributing factor: Temperature variance in reflow oven Zone 3 (±2.1°C vs. spec ±1.5°C). Corrective actions: (1) Stencil replacement cycle reduced from 90 to 60 days. (2) Reflow oven Zone 3 recalibrated and added to weekly PM schedule. Expected defect reduction: 0.35% by Q1 2025. Sign-off: QA Director 신사임당 (shin.saimdang@corp.example.com) 2024-12-22.

title: Manufacturing Process Improvement Plan 2025
content: Continuous Improvement Initiative — Manufacturing Division. Owner: VP Operations. Key initiatives: (1) SPC (Statistical Process Control) rollout to all 12 production lines by Q2 2025. (2) AutoInspect AI visual inspection system deployment — pilot Line 3 and 7 by Q1, full rollout Q3. (3) Supplier quality scorecards for top-10 component vendors. Target: overall defect rate ≤ 0.30% by Dec 2025. Budget approved: ₩480,000,000. Approved by: 이순신 (Director) 2025-01-03.

title: Quality Control Standards — PROD-001
content: PROD-001 Acceptance Quality Level (AQL) Specification. Inspection Level: II. Sampling Plan: ISO 2859-1. Critical defects: AQL 0.065 (zero tolerance). Major defects: AQL 1.0. Minor defects: AQL 4.0. Electrical test: 100% in-circuit test (ICT) mandatory. Burn-in: 4 hours at 45°C. Final inspection checklist: 47 line items. Document owner: Quality Engineering. Last reviewed: 2024-11-15. Next review: 2025-05-15.

title: Employee Leave Policy
content: Acme Corp Annual Leave Policy (2025). All permanent employees are entitled to: 15 days annual leave (0–3 years service), 18 days (3–7 years), 22 days (7+ years). Sick leave: 10 days per year (doctor's certificate required for 3+ consecutive days). Parental leave: 90 days fully paid (primary caregiver), 10 days (secondary caregiver). To apply: submit request via HR portal ≥5 business days in advance. Approving manager notified automatically. HR Contact: 신사임당 (shin.saimdang@corp.example.com, ext. 2201).

title: Globex Customer Satisfaction Survey — Q4 2024
content: Survey ID: GLX-2024-Q4-CSAT. Respondents: 2,341 customers. Overall CSAT: 87.3% (target 85% — MET). NPS: +42 (industry benchmark: +35). Top satisfaction drivers: Product reliability 91%, Delivery speed 88%, Customer support 84%. Improvement areas: Packaging 72%, Online portal UX 69%. Key verbatim (anonymized): 'Delivery was faster than expected', 'Support team resolved my issue on first call'. Report owner: Customer Experience Team. Distribution: Management only.
